title: SX1262.cs: handle unsolicited RX_PACKET and raise DIO1
acceptance_criteria: Sim-pushed RX_PACKET lands in SX1262 FIFO; DIO1 GPIO goes high; firmware ISR can read packet via ReadBuffer
close_reason: Implemented: WaitForRxResponse handles RX_PACKET/RX_TIMEOUT; raises IRQ; EC2 validation pending
